messages.author: them
messages.text: Did you send me a lasagna?

messages.author: them
messages.text: Why is there a note that says "hang in there, champ"

messages.author: me
messages.text: That was meant for my brother. He got dumped this morning.

messages.author: them
messages.imagePrompt: A takeaway lasagna on a doorstep in the early evening, with a handwritten sticky note on top that says 'hang in there, champ.' The door clearly shows the house number 24.

messages.author: me
messages.text: You live at 24. I reversed the numbers.

messages.author: them
messages.text: Correct. And now I have emotional support pasta.
